en_title: Filming Begins on The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum, With First Look Video Showing Andy Serkis Back in Character
cn_title: 《指环王：追寻咕噜》开拍，安迪·瑟金斯回归饰演咕噜
subtitle: 中土世界再度开机
opus_summary: 《指环王：追寻咕噜》正式开拍，导演兼主演安迪·瑟金斯以动作捕捉造型重返咕噜角色。影片定于2027年12月17日上映，多位原班演员回归。

paragraphs.en: The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum director and star Andy Serkis has released a video showing his return to Middle-earth, as filming gets underway.
paragraphs.cn: 随着拍摄启动，《指环王：追寻咕噜》导演兼主演安迪·瑟金斯发布一段视频，展示自己重返中土世界。

paragraphs.en: While not a full trailer, the behind-the-scenes video gives a peek at Serkis on set in mo-cap gear, back in character as Gollum. We also get a glimpse at the production's New Zealand location shoot — in a place that eagle-eyed fans may recognize.
paragraphs.cn: 这段幕后视频虽然不是完整预告片，却让观众看到瑟金斯身穿动作捕捉装备在片场重新化身咕噜。视频也短暂展示了剧组在新西兰的外景地，眼尖的粉丝或许认得这个地方。

paragraphs.en: "Here we go, onto the mocap stage for day one," Serkis says, strolling into Weta's motion capture studio. "What are we going to start with?" After being told they're starting with scene one, starring him, Serkis clambers on top of a nearby box and assumes a Gollum-like pose.
paragraphs.cn: 瑟金斯走进维塔的动作捕捉工作室时说：「出发，第一天走上动捕舞台。我们要从什么开始？」得知首先拍摄由他出演的第一场戏后，瑟金斯爬上附近的箱子，摆出咕噜般的姿势。

paragraphs.en: "And... action," Serkis growls, immediately sounding like Gollum again.
paragraphs.cn: 瑟金斯低吼道：「然后……开拍。」声音立刻又变回了咕噜。

paragraphs.en: The video concludes with a drone shot of location filming in the New Zealand mountains. While it's hard to make out any details, the landscape in general may look familiar — as it's featured in a specific Lord of the Rings movie scene.
paragraphs.cn: 视频最后以无人机拍摄的新西兰山区外景收尾。虽然难以辨认具体细节，但整体景观可能令人熟悉，因为它曾出现在《指环王》电影的一个特定场景中。

paragraphs.en: "For those who don't know, this filming location is where Frodo & Sam are climbing up the rock face in Two Towers opening scene... right before they meet Gollum!" noted Lord of the Rings fan RRworkshopstudio on YouTube. "I wonder what they'll show this time!"
paragraphs.cn: 《指环王》粉丝RRworkshopstudio在YouTube指出：「不知道的人可以注意，这个拍摄地正是《双塔奇兵》开场时弗罗多和山姆攀爬岩壁的地方……就在他们遇见咕噜之前！不知道这次会拍什么！」

paragraphs.en: Finally, the video notes The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum's December 17, 2027 release date and a hidden message written in Middle-earth runes. According to multiple fans on social media who have deciphered the text, it reads: "Something precious awaits," which sounds fitting.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，视频标注《指环王：追寻咕噜》将于2027年12月17日上映，并藏有一段用中土符文书写的信息。多名社交媒体粉丝破译后称，文字内容是「某件宝贝正在等待」，十分应景。

paragraphs.en: The Hunt for Gollum will reunite Serkis with his fellow Lord of the Rings co-stars Ian McKellen as Gandalf and Elijah Wood as Frodo, while Lee Pace is reprising his character of elven king Thranduil from The Hobbit film trilogy. New additions to the cast include Fifty Shades of Grey actor Jamie Dornan, who takes over from Viggo Mortensen as Aragorn, and The Super Mario Bros. Movie actress Anya Taylor-Joy, who will play a new "lethal elf" named Seren. Earlier this week, .
paragraphs.cn: 《追寻咕噜》将让瑟金斯与《指环王》旧搭档重聚：伊恩·麦克莱恩回归饰演甘道夫，伊利亚·伍德回归饰演弗罗多，李·佩斯则继续出演《霍比特人》电影三部曲中的精灵王瑟兰督伊。新加盟演员包括《五十度灰》演员杰米·多南，他将接替维果·莫腾森饰演阿拉贡；《超级马力欧兄弟大电影》演员安雅·泰勒-乔伊将饰演名叫Seren的新「致命精灵」。本周早些时候，[原文此处缺失内容]。

paragraphs.en: Serkis hit the headlines this week when he discussed The Hunt for Gollum's use of AI to digitally de-age some of The Lord of the Rings' aging stars , who will need to look younger than they did 25 years ago in Fellowship of the Ring. "There’s a little bit of de-aging for some of the characters and machine learning is part of the process," Serkis said.
paragraphs.cn: 瑟金斯本周因谈及《追寻咕噜》使用AI为部分年长的《指环王》演员进行数字减龄而登上新闻。这些演员需要看起来比25年前出演《护戒使者》时还年轻。瑟金斯表示：「有些角色会进行少量减龄处理，机器学习是流程的一部分。」

paragraphs.en: The Hunt for Gollum sees numerous characters seeking Serkis' character in order to discover the location of the One Ring. This time period is briefly shown during Fellowship's prologue, and covered just as briefly in Tolkien's original writings.
paragraphs.cn: 《追寻咕噜》中，多名角色为了查明至尊魔戒的位置而寻找瑟金斯饰演的角色。这段时期在《护戒使者》序章中短暂出现，托尔金原著也只用很少篇幅提及。

paragraphs.en: "I'm leaving him to it," The Lord of the Rings director Peter Jackson said previously , regarding Serkis taking the helm. "I'm there to help if I can help, if I can be of assistance at certain times, I'm there. But I'm giving him as much freedom as I can, because giving Andy freedom to make that movie will result in the best possible film."
paragraphs.cn: 谈到瑟金斯执导本片，《指环王》导演彼得·杰克逊此前表示：「我会把它交给他。如果我能帮忙，或者某些时候能提供协助，我会在那里。但我会尽可能给他自由，因为让Andy自由地拍这部电影，才能得到尽可能好的成片。」
